overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage beginning with a first-person view of a character using a handheld device in a dark alley, then transitioning to a third-person exploration of a vibrant neon-lit urban street with futuristic architecture and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark narrow back alley with industrial pipes

agents.ego_description: character stands stationary in a dimly lit alley, focused on a handheld device displaying a purple-tinted map interface

entered.detail: futuristic laptop with glowing screen showing a map and data readouts
rough concrete wall with pipes and industrial fixtures
corrugated metal wall with vertical ridges
white smoke or fog drifting in the distant alleyway

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a narrow, dark alleyway with industrial concrete and metal walls. The character holds a glowing handheld device displaying a map interface, standing still while faint smoke drifts in the distance. The environment is dimly lit with warm orange tones and completely devoid of other people.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit cyberpunk commercial street with hanging red lanterns

events.description: perspective shifts abruptly from first-person device view to third-person camera moving through a vibrant neon city street
camera begins descending stairs while maintaining forward momentum through the street

agents.ego_description: camera moves steadily forward through the cyberpunk street, descending stairs and navigating between pedestrians and street fixtures

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants standing near the building corner
group of pedestrians walking along the right side of the street

entered.detail: tall multi-story building with glass facades and external neon lighting
cluster of glowing red spherical lanterns hanging across the street
large floating digital advertisement with purple and blue glow
green illuminated vending machine with orange display
black metal fence blocking off a section of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a vibrant cyberpunk street illuminated by neon signs and red hanging lanterns. The camera moves forward through the urban environment, passing pedestrians, vending machines, and futuristic buildings with holographic advertisements. The atmosphere is dense with purple and pink neon light reflecting off wet asphalt as the camera descends stairs and continues down the commercial street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a secluded, dimly lit industrial alleyway into a vibrant, neon-drenched urban thoroughfare. It begins in a narrow space of concrete and metal, where a glowing handheld map provides the primary light source amidst drifting smoke and warm orange tones. As the camera moves forward, the claustrophobic alley opens up into a bustling cyberpunk street illuminated by red hanging lanterns and holographic advertisements. The atmosphere shifts to a dense palette of purple and pink neon reflecting off wet asphalt as the camera descends a set of stairs. The scene finally expands across a commercial district filled with pedestrians and futuristic vending machines under the glow of towering city architecture.
